title: Just Like Rays
body:
Overhaul minecraft block light to behave more like real light, for example walls will cast shadows
#### Disclaimer: this isnt a shader This mod impact **server side** and **saves**. You cant (yet) disable it as you would for a shader. Consider either doing a **backup** or using it on **a new world**.
![torches lighting circular areas with villager's houses walls casting shadows from them](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/565103f8a03289e9923354bfe0fff7fd35c70bd7.png)
This mod is in alpha. It should be stable but expect quirks in edge cases scenarios. Please report any bug, It help immensely. #### Info: - On adding/removing/updating this mod, do Edit>Optimize world>Erase cache for compatibility. #### Known Incompatibilities: - Starlight/ScallableLux - Bobby - Sinytra connector for forge 1.20.1 (otherwise it works)
